prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年辽宁省物理类最低位次分别为2751→2918→2846→3001→3397，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约551名；2025年基准位次约3397名，较2024年大幅 后移396名，为近5年最大单年降幅，反映当年报考竞争明显加剧；2021–2023年本省物理类计划均为35人，2024–2025年缩减至30人，2026年 计划仍为30人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，军队唯一进入国家"双一流"建设行列的院校；软科中国大学排名中因军事 类院校特殊性未进入主榜top200，但学校综合实力与顶尖985相当；该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情、抖音热度排名及投档异常数据中均未出现，说明近年来无重大 负面舆情事件，报考心理环境平稳；作为军事类院校，社会关注度相对稳定；第五轮学科评估数据未公开收录（军事类院校特殊性），但据公开信息，系统科学 、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息与通信工程、管理科学与工程等学科处于国内领先水平，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等核心 专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别，社会报考热度不减；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万人，按近年物理类占比约71.8%估算物理类考生约 14.36万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争环境稳定；学校位于湖南省长沙市（非本省），辽宁考生属跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移后存在一定回调压力、 招生计划持平、考生总数稳定、核心专业热度持续等因素，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅前移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约3347名，区间2847–3847名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（天河拔尖班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、网络工程、信息安全）
- 理论与应用力学（航天力学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程、微电子科学与工程等）
- 自动化类（自动化（无人机方向）、机器人工程、人工智能）
- 航空航天类（航空航天工程、飞行器动力工程、材料科学与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 大气科学类（大气科学、气象技术与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2847–3847名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业可冲刺（尤其位次明显优于区间下限时），三档专业作为保底。国防科技大学为军事类院校，报考需 满足政治面貌（中共党员或共青团员）、应届高中毕业生等附加条件，且入校后以英语为公共外语教学，请考生提前确认自身条件是否符合。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the Physics Category in Liaoning Province were 2751 → 2918 → 2846 → 3001 → 3397, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 551 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3397, a significant backward shift of 396 places compared to 2024, the largest single-year decline in the past 5 years, reflecting a marked increase in competition for that year; from 2021 to 2023, the provincial Physics Category plan was 35 students each year, reduced to 30 from 2024 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains at 30, unchanged from 2025, with no impact from expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, the only military institution in the country to enter the national 'Double First-Class' construction ranks; due to the特殊性 of military institutions, it does not appear in the top 200 of the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, but its overall strength is comparable to top 985 universities; the school has not appeared in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity rankings, or abnormal admission data from 2021 to 2026, indicating no major negative public opinion events in recent years, with a stable psychological environment for applicants; as a military institution, social attention is relatively stable; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not publicly available (due to the特殊性 of military institutions), but according to public information, disciplines such as Systems Science, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering are at the domestic leading level, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication have been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with sustained social application enthusiasm; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent proportion of about 71.8%, roughly the same as in 2025, indicating a stable competitive environment; the school is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province (not within the province), so Liaoning candidates are applying across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the pressure for a rebound after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, unchanged enrollment plan, stable total number of candidates, and sustained popularity of core majors, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted lowest ranking of approximately 3347, and a range of 2847–3847.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Tianhe Top Class)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Network Engineering, Information Security)
- Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Aerospace Mechanics Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Automation Category (Automation (UAV Direction), Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Aerospace Category (Aerospace Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Atmospheric Science Category (Atmospheric Science, Meteorological Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2847–3847, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially when the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. As a military institution, the National University of Defense Technology requires additional conditions such as political affiliation (Chinese Communist Party member or Communist Youth League member) and current year high school graduates, and uses English as the public foreign language for teaching. Candidates should confirm their eligibility in advance.

_translation.university_name_en: National University of Defense Technology of the People's Liberation Army
